text: The environment feels stimulating and charged with potential. The glass walls and bright, modern design make me aware of boundaries, yet also invite curiosity. Inside, the vibrant graphics and fragmented screens ignite my thinking—am I the observer, or part of the experiment? There’s a sense of anticipation, as though meaning emerges only if I stay present, attentive to confusion as part of creation. In this space, I feel both exposed and invited to explore the blurred lines between knowing and not knowing. It is slightly disorienting, but deeply energizing.
